title: string-of-int
description: "Make integer-to-string intent explicit."
sidebar:
  badge:

    class: severity-indicator severity-error

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-error" aria-hidden="true"></span> `error`

Make integer-to-string intent explicit. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
text := string(value)
```

## Good

```go
text := strconv.Itoa(value)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only string-of-int`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
